chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 565 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.2. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3020/2017. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. M. Jehangir, advocate holding brief for Ms. Ismat Mehdi, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Petitioner’s counsel states that petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
